channel.title: 跨境电商早报
channel.description: 每日自动抓取跨境电商行业资讯，包括平台动态、市场趋势、跨境物流等

item.title: Trump order shakes ecommerce with China 关税 shift
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order to eliminate 税费-free treatment for low-value imports from China — using the de minimis exemption — is sending shockwaves across the ecommerce and direct-to-消费者 (DTC) landscape, forcing brands to rethink pricing, sourcing, and inventory strategies as tariffs threaten to reshape the industry’s financial...

item.title: Ecommerce Trends: 5 shifts happening because of new tariffs and trade rules
item.description: It has been impossible to ignore the impact of tariffs on ecommerce in 2025. From earnings calls to 零售 leaders’ in-person talks at the White House, executives have been clear that new tariffs and changes to established trade agreements are creating challenges and making it difficult to plan for the future. Across ecommerce and online […] The post Ecommerce...

item.title: MENA ecommerce market could reach $57.8 billion by 2029
item.description: The Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region’s ecommerce sector is experiencing robust 增长, with the market reaching $34.5 billion in 2024 — a 13% year-on-year 增加 — and projected to expand to $57.8 billion by 2029. This data comes from the fifth edition of the “电子商务 Report in the MENA Region 2024,” released by […] The post MENA ecommerce market could reach...

item.title: Tariffs lead 跨境 ecommerce to roadblocks
item.description: A sweeping surge in global 海关 enforcement is catching online retailers off guard, driving up costs and disrupting international supply chains, according to a new report by 物流 and 物流运输 solutions provider ePost Global. In its 2025 物流运输 optimization analysis, ePost analyzed 15.6 million international ecommerce shipments totaling $421 million. It found that 73%...

item.title: Dubai’s ecommerce market to reach $13.8 billion by 2029
item.description: Dubai is undergoing a rapid and transformative ecommerce boom, according to the 电子商务 Report in the MENA Region 2024, published by Invest in Dubai and supported by the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism. It projects the emirate’s ecommerce market to grow from AED 32.3 billion (USD $8.8 billion) in 2024 to AED 50.6 billion […] The post Dubai’s ecommerce...

item.title: DHL 扩张 物流运输 services for Shopify’s US merchants
item.description: International carrier DHL and ecommerce software provider Shopify are expanding their 物流运输 services for U.S. merchants, the companies announced Aug. 25. DHL has directly integrated its ecommerce and Express services with Shopify. That 集成 allows Shopify’s U.S.-based merchants to access DHL eCommerce’s Parcel International Direct and Parcel International...

item.title: Ecommerce Trends: What changed when de minimis rules ended
item.description: When de minimis exemptions ended in the U.S. on Aug. 29, following an executive order from the White House, the math shifted significantly for the costs of importing goods that previously fit through the long-standing loophole. The changes have implications not only for Shein and Temu, two East Asia-based ecommerce giants that benefited when de […] The post...

item.title: Black Friday sets new record, cementing itself as an ecommerce sales day in 2025
item.description: Following a record-setting day for Thanksgiving ecommerce sales, consumers spent $11.8 billion online on Black Friday 2025. That’s the first time that Black Friday online sales reached or exceeded $11 billion, setting a new record for the fourth straight year. It’s also 9.1% year-over-year 增长 from Black Friday 2024, according to analysis from Adobe...

item.title: FedEx 收入 exceeds $23 billion in Q2, first time in three years
item.description: FedEx Corp. 收入 reached its highest point in 15 quarters in its fiscal Q2 2026, which ended Nov. 30, 2025. Through the first half of its fiscal 2026, FedEx 收入 has reached $45.7 billion. That’s its second-highest since its fiscal 2020, which began in 2019. Since then, FedEx 收入 has only been higher through the […] The post FedEx 收入 exceeds $23 billion in Q2,...

item.title: The Global Economic Impact of a Potential Closure of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is one of the most strategically important maritime chokepoints in the global economy. Located between Iran and Oman, this narrow waterway connects the Persian Gulf with... The post The Global Economic Impact of a Potential Closure of the Strait of Hormuz appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Refurbed reaches €3 billion GMV and accelerates expansion across Europe
item.description: The European recommerce sector continues to gain momentum as Refurbed, the Vienna-based 电商平台 for refurbished products, has surpassed €3 billion in cumulative gross merchandise volume (GMV) and announced a major... The post Refurbed reaches €3 billion GMV and accelerates expansion across Europe appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Back Market Surpasses €3.5 Billion GMV in 2025 as Recommerce Gains Momentum in Europe
item.description: The European recommerce sector has reached a new milestone, with the French 电商平台 Back Market reporting strong 增长 in 2025. The company achieved more than €3.5 billion in gross merchandise... The post Back Market Surpasses €3.5 Billion GMV in 2025 as Recommerce Gains Momentum in Europe appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: APAC 电子商务 Merchants Lose $72 Billion Every Year to Payment and Operational Inefficiencies
item.description: The Asia-Pacific region is the fastest-growing 电子商务 market in the world. From China and South Korea to the rapidly expanding digital economies of Southeast Asia, online 零售 continues to accelerate... The post APAC 电子商务 Merchants Lose $72 Billion Every Year to Payment and Operational Inefficiencies appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: UK Startup Voxelo Raises €346K to Transform Product Videos into 3D Content for 电子商务
item.description: Manchester-based startup Voxelo has secured €346,000 (£300,000) in the first close of its pre-seed 融资 round, aiming to bring a faster and more accessible 3D and 人工智能-powered product content studio... The post UK Startup Voxelo Raises €346K to Transform Product Videos into 3D Content for 电子商务 appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Klaviyo and Shopify announce deeper product 集成
item.description: Customer relationship management (CRM) platform Klaviyo announced deepened product 集成 with ecommerce software provider Shopify. Klaviyo said the “expanded interoperability helps enterprises better unify customer data across regions.” In doing so, it said, the 集成 helps to deliver “consistent, localized experiences worldwide.” Klaviyo framed the 集成 around...

item.title: Temu Challenges 亚马逊 for 跨境 电子商务 Dominance
item.description: 跨境 电子商务 has become one of the fastest-growing segments of global online 零售. Consumers increasingly purchase products from sellers in other countries, attracted by wider product selection and competitive prices.... The post Temu Challenges 亚马逊 for 跨境 电子商务 Dominance appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: EU 电子商务 Compliance Guide +Links
item.description: Selling online inside the European Union is not just about launching a store, adding payment methods, and 物流运输 products. A brand that wants to operate legally in the EU must... The post EU 电子商务 Compliance Guide +Links appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Iran War Impact on 电子商务: How the Conflict Is Reshaping Global Online Trade
item.description: The impact of the Iran War on 电子商务 is rapidly becoming one of the most significant economic ripple effects of the 2026 geopolitical crisis. What began as a military escalation... The post Iran War Impact on 电子商务: How the Conflict Is Reshaping Global Online Trade appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Dutch Startup Sparqle Raises €1.5M to Scale Emission-Free 配送 for 电子商务
item.description: Amsterdam-based startup Sparqle has secured €1.5 million in fresh 融资 to accelerate the development of its emission-free 配送 infrastructure for modern 电子商务. The round includes backing from the European Union... The post Dutch Startup Sparqle Raises €1.5M to Scale Emission-Free 配送 for 电子商务 appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.

item.title: Ultra-Fast 配送 Is Becoming the New Battleground in U.S. 电子商务
item.description: The U.S. 电子商务 market is entering a new phase where 配送 speed is no longer a competitive advantage—it is a requirement. What began as a differentiator pioneered by 亚马逊 has... The post Ultra-Fast 配送 Is Becoming the New Battleground in U.S. 电子商务 appeared first on 跨境 Magazine.
